zh.Haddon, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Barley於1240年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Barley23歲，母親Joan De Reresby20歲。他於1269年與Debarley de Vernon在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1276年之後在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Barley was born in 1240, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Barley, was 23 and his mother, Joan De Reresby, was 20. He married Debarley de Vernon in 1269, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 1276, in his hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Barley(이)가 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Barley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Reresby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1269년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Debarley de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1276년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
